title: Knysna United stuns Jaguars
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United defeated Jaguars...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United defeated Jaguars (Craggs) 26–16 yesterday 17 May in front of an electrified home crowd at Loeriepark stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna United defeated Jaguars (Craggs) 26–16 yesterday 17 May in front of an electrified home crowd at Loeriepark stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From the opening whistle, Knysna United showed they meant business."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A series of well-crafted tries and a reliable boot from the tee ensured Knysna entered the break with momentum firmly in their corner.","html":"A series of well-crafted tries and a reliable boot from the tee ensured Knysna entered the break with momentum firmly in their corner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By halftime, Knysna had built an imposing 21–3 lead.","html":"By halftime, Knysna had built an imposing 21–3 lead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
